name: Tomato Gratin a La Provencale
recipeIngredient: 2 pounds tomatoes cut in half crosswise
1/2 cup fine bread crumbs (fresh or dry)
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 400°F.
2. Lightly oil a gratin dish large enough to accommodate the tomatoes.
3. Gently squeeze the seeds out of the tomatoes and place them cut side up in the gratin dish. Lightly salt and pepper, and sprinkle with a little sugar if needed.
4. Mix together the garlic, parsley, and bread crumbs.
5. Top the tomatoes with this mixture.
6. Drizzle with oil.
7. Bake for 20 to 30 minutes, until the bread crumb mixture browns. Sprinkle with herbes de Provence.
8. Serve hot or at room temperature.
